BLP Parameter Manager

Source: R/parameters.R
BLPParameters.Rd

Manages BLP model parameter compression, expansion, bounds, and labels.

Methods

Public methods

  • BLPParameters$new()

  • BLPParameters$compress()

  • BLPParameters$expand()

  • BLPParameters$get_bounds()

  • BLPParameters$get_labels()

  • BLPParameters$get_sigma_free()

  • BLPParameters$get_pi_free()

  • BLPParameters$n_free()

  • BLPParameters$print()

  • BLPParameters$clone()

Method new()

Usage

BLPParameters$new(
  sigma = NULL,
  pi = NULL,
  rho = NULL,
  beta = NULL,
  gamma = NULL,
  sigma_bounds = NULL,
  pi_bounds = NULL,
  rho_bounds = NULL,
  beta_bounds = NULL,
  gamma_bounds = NULL,
  rc_types = NULL
)

Method compress()

Usage

BLPParameters$compress(
  sigma = NULL,
  pi = NULL,
  rho = NULL,
  beta = NULL,
  gamma = NULL
)

Method expand()

Usage

BLPParameters$expand(theta)

Usage

Usage

Method print()

Usage

BLPParameters$print(...)

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

BLPParameters$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
